nasb.text: Her princes within her are like wolves tearing the prey, by shedding blood and destroying lives in order to get dishonest gain.

esv.text: Her princes in her midst are like wolves tearing the prey, shedding blood, destroying lives to get dishonest gain.

cnv.text: 其中的官長好像撕碎獵物的豺狼，流人的血，滅人的命，為要得不義之財。

ccb.text: 你的首领好像撕碎猎物的豺狼，杀人流血，谋取不义之财。
